text:
Created attachment 146539
complete build log

If option NLS=off then news/tin does not build with the following error: 

gmake -C /wrkdirs/usr/ports/news/tin/work/tin-2.2.1/po
gmake: Entering directory `/wrkdirs/usr/ports/news/tin/work/tin-2.2.1/po'
gmake: *** No targets specified and no makefile found.  Stop.
gmake: Leaving directory `/wrkdirs/usr/ports/news/tin/work/tin-2.2.1/po'
*** [post-build] Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/news/tin.

Complete build log is attached.
